description_long: This is a rectangular juice carton with a predominantly white body and a red top. The front features the brand name 'EASY MOUZUO' in blue and white, along with the product description 'boisson de Cocktail COCKTAIL' and an image of a straw hat resting on a stack of colorful fruit slices, suggesting a mixed fruit cocktail flavor. The carton holds 1 liter (33.8 fl oz) of juice, as indicated at the bottom front. One side of the carton displays a detailed nutritional information panel, while the opposite side contains multilingual product information and a barcode. The top of the carton is red with a visible white rectangular area, likely for opening or pouring, but no distinct cap is visible.
description: A rectangular, red-and-white juice carton labeled 'EASY MOUZUO' with colorful fruit imagery and a straw hat, holding 1 liter of cocktail juice.
description_view_0: Front view showing the brand 'EASY MOUZUO', fruit and hat illustration, and product details.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the nutritional information panel and some product details.
description_view_2: Alternate front view with similar branding and imagery as view 0, but with slight text variation ('cocktail nectar').
description_view_3: Opposite side view with multilingual product information and a barcode.
attribute_juice_flavor_illustration: stacked slices of various fruits and a straw hat
